steps.title: Define September sales
steps.content: Let $S$ be the number of sales in September. August sales were $15$ more than $3$ times September sales, so August sales were $3S+15$.

steps.title: Use the total
steps.content: Together, August and September had $363$ sales: $S+(3S+15)=363$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: $4S+15=363$, so $4S=348$ and $S=87$. The dealer completed 87 sales in September.
